title: Cats vs. Dogs
text:
The age old question, “cats or dogs”, has long been debated. From ancient times, both have been revered as companions, utilized for their hunting prowess, and appreciated for their beauty. But…… how do we feel about them at EPA?









Unfortunately, its a resounding vote for dogs. Cats, better luck next time.

title: Hello there!
text: This site hosts the results from and ruminations on The Hallway Poll. The Hallway Poll was developed to help bring joy and intrigue to the WJCS 4232 suite and all those who pass through it. Please explore the site by using the navigation bar to explore.
